---
# Rare / low-frequency processes (execution anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Anomaly seed: count executions per binary and keep only the rarely-seen ones (`filter execs <= 2`). New or seldom-run binaries in an environment are worth a look (dropped tools, one-off scripts, `reg.exe`/`bitsadmin` living-off-the-land). Combine with a longer window and a baseline lookup of known-good binaries to suppress the expected long tail.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and actor_process_image_name != null
| comp count() as execs by actor_process_image_name
| filter execs <= 2
| sort asc execs
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
